assumptions.assumption: V31 judgment artifacts are hash-bound to V30 receipt artifacts.
assumptions.verification: V32 reloads both directories and compares receipt hashes before writing score evidence.

assumptions.assumption: Task success cannot be inferred from returncode alone.
assumptions.verification: V32 requires a task-specific verification spec with expected receipt fields.

execution_path: direct Codex implementation with deterministic fixture gates
objective: Turn live receipt judgments into benchmark-scoring evidence without collapsing returncode evidence into unsupported success claims.

parallelism.fan_in: V33 aggregates only after required V32 task score artifacts exist.

phases.entry: V31 judgment and V30 receipt directories exist.
phases.exit: score.json records pass/fail eligibility with source hashes.

phases.entry: One or more V32 score artifacts exist.
phases.exit: aggregate-score.json records task counts, pass counts, and unsupported-claim blocks.
reviewed-score.json separates confirmed, refuted, and unverified claims.
publishable report states evidence limits and non-goals.

risk_gates.rule: A zero returncode is never sufficient without a verification spec and review.

workers.permissions: read V30/V31 artifacts, write out/live-scores only
read V32 scores, write aggregate only
read reviewed score, write report only
